{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "GTI Investment - We are your trusted partner in investment banking services. Our broad range of service offerings comprises Securities Dealing, Asset Management, Trusteeship, Corporate Finance, Private Equity, and Micro banking. Since 1998, we have actively HandHeld our highly diversified client base &ndash; Corporations, Financial Institutions, Governments, and Individuals &ndash; to a financially secure future.&nbsp;

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
Strategic Financial Leadership:


	Develop and execute financial strategies that align with our business goals.
	Drive strategic decision - making by providing actionable financial insights to the executive team


Operational Excellence:


	Oversee budgeting, forecasting, and financial reporting processes to ensure accuracy and timeliness.
	Optimize cash flow management
	Lead initiatives to improve operational efficiency, reducing cost overruns and maximizing profitability.


Team Leadership &amp; Development:


	Mentor and manage the finance team, fostering a culture of accountability, continuous improvement, and high performance.
	Encourage professional development and create succession plans to support the evolving needs of the business.


Stakeholder Engagement:


	Liaise with external partners, including banks, investors, and auditors, to build and maintain strong relationships.
	Present financial performance reports and strategic recommendations to senior management.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related field; MBA or professional accounting qualification (e.g., ICAN, ACCA, CPA) is highly preferred.
	5 - 10 years of progressive experience in finance, with at least 3 - 5 years in a senior management role.
	Proven track record of strategic financial leadership and operational excellence in a fast - paced, growth - oriented environment.
	In - depth knowledge of financial regulations, risk management, and compliance standards in Nigeria.
	Strong analytical, decision - making, and communication skills.
	Experience in leading high - performing teams and driving organizational change.
	Proficiency in financial software; advanced Excel skills required.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover letter to: career@gti.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject&nbsp; of the mail.",

Accountant Job at GTI Investment




        
    

        
        GTI Investment - We are your trusted partner in investment banking services. Our broad range of service offerings comprises Securities Dealing, Asset Management, Trusteeship, Corporate Finance, Private Equity, and Micro banking. Since 1998, we have actively HandHeld our highly diversified client base – Corporations, Financial Institutions, Governments, and Individuals – to a financially secure future. 

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
Strategic Financial Leadership:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Develop and execute financial strategies that align with our business goals.
	Drive strategic decision - making by providing actionable financial insights to the executive team


Operational Excellence:


	Oversee budgeting, forecasting, and financial reporting processes to ensure accuracy and timeliness.
	Optimize cash flow management
	Lead initiatives to improve operational efficiency, reducing cost overruns and maximizing profitability.


Team Leadership & Development:


	Mentor and manage the finance team, fostering a culture of accountability, continuous improvement, and high performance.
	Encourage professional development and create succession plans to support the evolving needs of the business.


Stakeholder Engagement:


	Liaise with external partners, including banks, investors, and auditors, to build and maintain strong relationships.
	Present financial performance reports and strategic recommendations to senior management.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, or a related field; MBA or professional accounting qualification (e.g., ICAN, ACCA, CPA) is highly preferred.
	5 - 10 years of progressive experience in finance, with at least 3 - 5 years in a senior management role.
	Proven track record of strategic financial leadership and operational excellence in a fast - paced, growth - oriented environment.
	In - depth knowledge of financial regulations, risk management, and compliance standards in Nigeria.
	Strong analytical, decision - making, and communication skills.
	Experience in leading high - performing teams and driving organizational change.
	Proficiency in financial software; advanced Excel skills required.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject  of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "@context": "https://schema.org",

  "title": "Internal Auditor",
  "description": "Agrinova Limited - We are into allocating of lands to client and planting of palm fruit.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Auditor

Job Location: Sangotedo - Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Internal Auditor to assess and strengthen internal controls, risk management, and financial processes.
	The role involves reviewing financial records, ensuring compliance, and providing recommendations to improve efficiency and accountability.


Requirements


	Minimum of 3&ndash;5 years of experience in auditing or accounting
	Strong knowledge of internal controls and financial reporting
	HND/BSc in Accounting, Finance, or related field
	Professional certification (ICAN/ACCA or in view) is an advantage
	Must reside in or around Sangotedo.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send an updated copy of their CV to: brgrecruit@brg.com.ng using &ldquo;Internal Auditor&rdquo; as the subject of the mail.&nbsp;

Note: Applicants must reside within or around the Sangotedo axis.",

Internal Auditor Job at Agrinova Limited




        
    

        
        Agrinova Limited - We are into allocating of lands to client and planting of palm fruit.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Auditor

Job Location: Sangotedo - Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Internal Auditor to assess and strengthen internal controls, risk management, and financial processes.
	The role involves reviewing financial records, ensuring compliance, and providing recommendations to improve efficiency and accountability.


Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in auditing or accounting
	Strong knowledge of internal controls and financial reporting
	HND/BSc in Accounting, Finance, or related field
	Professional certification (ICAN/ACCA or in view) is an advantage
	Must reside in or around Sangotedo.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send an updated copy of their CV to: [email protected] using “Internal Auditor” as the subject of the mail. 

Note: Applicants must reside within or around the Sangotedo axis.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "IT Support Officer",
  "description": "Agrinova Limited - We are into allocating of lands to client and planting of palm fruit

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Support Officer

Job Location: Sangotedo, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a skilled IT Support Officer to manage and maintain IT systems, troubleshoot technical issues, and ensure smooth day-to-day operations.


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in IT support
	Knowledge of hardware, software, and network systems
	Problem-solving and troubleshooting skills
	HND / B.Sc in Computer Science or related field
	Must reside in or around Sangotedo

  "title": "Human Resources Business Partner (HRBP)",
  "description": "DET Consulting &amp; Outsourcing Limited is a Human Resource and Outsourcing solutions firm committed to helping organizations attract top talent, optimize workforce performance, and drive business growth. We specialize in recruitment, staff outsourcing, HR advisory, training, and payroll services, delivering customized solutions that align with organizational goals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Business Partner (HRBP)

Job Location: Atan, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: FMCG

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly skilled and strategic Human Resources Business Partner to support business operations by aligning HR strategies with organizational goals.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving employee engagement, managing HR functions, and supporting leadership in workforce planning and performance management within a fast-paced FMCG environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Partner with management to align HR strategies with business objectives
	Oversee recruitment, onboarding, and workforce planning processes
	Manage employee relations and ensure fair application of HR policies
	Drive performance management, appraisal, and improvement processes
	Support training, learning, and development initiatives
	Monitor and improve employee engagement and retention strategies
	Ensure compliance with Nigerian labour laws and internal policies
	Handle disciplinary and grievance cases professionally
	Provide HR analytics and reports to support decision-making
	Support organizational development and change management initiatives


Requirements


	B.Sc in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field
	3&ndash;5 years of HR experience (FMCG or manufacturing experience is an advantage)
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian labour laws and HR best practices
	Excellent communication, interpersonal, and stakeholder management skills
	Strong problem-solving and conflict resolution ability
	Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced environment.
	Accommodation: Available.


Salary
N300,000 per month Net.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: info.detconsultingltd@gmail.com using&nbsp; the Job Position as the sbject of the mail.",

Human Resources Business Partner (HRBP) Job at DET Consulting & Outsourcing Limited




        
    

        
        DET Consulting & Outsourcing Limited is a Human Resource and Outsourcing solutions firm committed to helping organizations attract top talent, optimize workforce performance, and drive business growth. We specialize in recruitment, staff outsourcing, HR advisory, training, and payroll services, delivering customized solutions that align with organizational goals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Business Partner (HRBP)

Job Location: Atan, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: FMCG

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly skilled and strategic Human Resources Business Partner to support business operations by aligning HR strategies with organizational goals.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving employee engagement, managing HR functions, and supporting leadership in workforce planning and performance management within a fast-paced FMCG environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Partner with management to align HR strategies with business objectives
	Oversee recruitment, onboarding, and workforce planning processes
	Manage employee relations and ensure fair application of HR policies
	Drive performance management, appraisal, and improvement processes
	Support training, learning, and development initiatives
	Monitor and improve employee engagement and retention strategies
	Ensure compliance with Nigerian labour laws and internal policies
	Handle disciplinary and grievance cases professionally
	Provide HR analytics and reports to support decision-making
	Support organizational development and change management initiatives


Requirements


	B.Sc in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field
	3–5 years of HR experience (FMCG or manufacturing experience is an advantage)
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian labour laws and HR best practices
	Excellent communication, interpersonal, and stakeholder management skills
	Strong problem-solving and conflict resolution ability
	Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced environment.

Salary
N300,000 per month Net.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "IT / Full-Stack Developer",
  "description": "FHON Consulting - We pride ourselves with working with clients who are ambitious and want to set define goals and objectives. FHON Consulting believes that putting the right things in place such as people, processes, and systems with exceptional customers&rsquo; expectation in mind, will get one to the right place.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT / Full-Stack Developer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a versatile IT / Full-Stack Developer to join our IT team. In this role, you will split your time between developing modern web applications and supporting our internal office IT infrastructure. You will work directly on our core platforms while ensuring daily technical operations run smoothly.


Key Responsibilities
Software Engineering &amp; Development:


	Build and maintain responsive frontend interfaces using Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS.
	Develop, optimize, and connect secure backend APIs using Laravel and manage relational databases using MySQL.
	Integrate third-party RESTful APIs, manage webhooks, and implement data caching strategies to ensure fast page loads.
	Write maintainable code using modern version control practices via Git and GitHub.


IT Support &amp; Infrastructure:


	Manage corporate IT operations, including setting up office Wi-Fi routers, provisioning team emails, and managing access to internal company portals.
	Provide hardware and software troubleshooting for staff laptops, printers, and core operating systems.
	Monitor system performance, maintain regular database backups, and troubleshoot basic web server configurations (including WordPress platform updates or license issues).


Requirements
Required Technical Skills:


	Frontend Stack: JavaScript, React.js, Next.js (App Router experience is a plus), and Tailwind CSS / UI libraries (like Shadcn UI).
	Backend Stack: PHP (Laravel framework preferred) and core RESTful API development.
	Databases: Experience writing and optimizing SQL queries using MySQL.
	Tools &amp; Infrastructure: Git/GitHub, Postman, basic networking knowledge, and standard cloud hosting platforms.


Soft Skills &amp; Mindset:


	Logical Troubleshooting: A clear, step-by-step approach to identifying bugs in code or failures in network hardware.
	Prioritization: Ability to handle multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment and identify high-priority issues quickly.
	Adaptability: Comfortable transitioning from building an engineering feature to solving an office IT infrastructure issue.
	Clear Communication: Able to explain technical solutions plainly to non-technical team members and management.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 / month.",

IT / Full-Stack Developer Job at FHON Consulting




        
    

        
        FHON Consulting - We pride ourselves with working with clients who are ambitious and want to set define goals and objectives. FHON Consulting believes that putting the right things in place such as people, processes, and systems with exceptional customers’ expectation in mind, will get one to the right place.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT / Full-Stack Developer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a versatile IT / Full-Stack Developer to join our IT team. In this role, you will split your time between developing modern web applications and supporting our internal office IT infrastructure. You will work directly on our core platforms while ensuring daily technical operations run smoothly.


Key Responsibilities
Software Engineering & Development:


	Build and maintain responsive frontend interfaces using Next.js, React, and Tailwind CSS.
	Develop, optimize, and connect secure backend APIs using Laravel and manage relational databases using MySQL.
	Integrate third-party RESTful APIs, manage webhooks, and implement data caching strategies to ensure fast page loads.
	Write maintainable code using modern version control practices via Git and GitHub.


IT Support & Infrastructure:


	Manage corporate IT operations, including setting up office Wi-Fi routers, provisioning team emails, and managing access to internal company portals.
	Provide hardware and software troubleshooting for staff laptops, printers, and core operating systems.
	Monitor system performance, maintain regular database backups, and troubleshoot basic web server configurations (including WordPress platform updates or license issues).


Requirements
Required Technical Skills:


	Frontend Stack: JavaScript, React.js, Next.js (App Router experience is a plus), and Tailwind CSS / UI libraries (like Shadcn UI).
	Backend Stack: PHP (Laravel framework preferred) and core RESTful API development.
	Databases: Experience writing and optimizing SQL queries using MySQL.
	Tools & Infrastructure: Git/GitHub, Postman, basic networking knowledge, and standard cloud hosting platforms.


Soft Skills & Mindset:


	Logical Troubleshooting: A clear, step-by-step approach to identifying bugs in code or failures in network hardware.
	Prioritization: Ability to handle multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment and identify high-priority issues quickly.
	Adaptability: Comfortable transitioning from building an engineering feature to solving an office IT infrastructure issue.
	Clear Communication: Able to explain technical solutions plainly to non-technical team members and management.


Salary
